title: tpp project configuration
description: Configuration file for a tpp template project. Place tpp-config.json in the project root.

types.description: Glob patterns (relative to this config file) for type definition files (.tpp).

items.description: A glob pattern such as "*.tpp" or "types/*.tpp".

templates.description: Glob patterns (relative to this config file) for template source files (.tpp).

items.description: A glob pattern such as "*.tpp" or "templates/*.tpp".

replacement-policies.description: Paths (relative to this config file) to replacement-policy JSON files.

items.description: A path to a replacement-policy JSON file.

previews.description: Preview configurations used by the LSP to render the template with sample input.

name.description: Optional display name for this preview entry.

template.description: Name of the template function to render (e.g. "main").

signature.description: Optional parameter type signature used to disambiguate overloaded templates (e.g. ["string"] or ["list<string>"]).

input.description: Input data for the template. Either an inline JSON value or a path string pointing to a .json file relative to this config.

oneOf.description: Path to a JSON input file, relative to this config.
